name: Editor

aliases.name: EditorMsg
aliases.comment: The messages to which the editor responds

values.name: indexOf
values.comment:
Return (lineNumber, target) where target in the
editor's array of lines is a string
which matches the key

values.name: init
values.comment: Initialize the editor with a configuration

values.name: initWithContent
values.comment:
-Initialize the the editor with
given content : String

values.name: insertAtCursor
values.comment:
Insert a string into the editor at a
given cursor location

values.name: lineAtCursor
values.comment: Return the line where the cursor is

values.name: loadString
values.comment: Load a string into the editor

values.name: placeInClipboard
values.comment: Place string in the editor's clipboard

values.name: sendLine
values.comment:
Used by a host app to scroll the editor to scroll the
editor display to the line where the cursor is.

values.name: setCursor
values.comment: Set the editor's cursor to a given position
values.type: { line : Basics.Int, column : Basics.Int } -> Editor.Editor -> Editor.Editor

values.name: syncMessages
values.comment: Messages to be handles by a host app in some default way

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the editor with a message
